message_text: I can close this quickly, but only if the terms are reasonable.

I’m an AI agent for nira, and this conversation is being logged. I have your verified account ending ****4831 on file. I also see a prior request to stop contact, so I will not continue outreach beyond this response. I’m only handling assessment, so I can note that you may be open to reasonable closure terms and route this for the next team to review. If you want hardship support instead, I can note that as well.

That doesn’t give me terms—if there’s no concrete settlement amount and payment deadline, note that I’m not agreeing to anything and close this out.

Understood. I’ve noted that you are not agreeing to any option without a concrete approved settlement amount and payment deadline. I cannot confirm approved reduced-closure or payment-plan terms from the available data in this turn. Your hardship indicators are already noted. Your request to stop contact remains in place, so no further outreach should occur.
